upstream_api_sse.failure: isolated empty-home readiness was degraded while one health test expected ok

blockers: Authorized real-model two-turn acceptance has not been run.
Live authentication requires a supported provider credential already exported in the overseer environment; retrieving or copying production credentials is not authorized.
Native API server lacks an explicit final-schema no-tools contract.
Run SSE has no Last-Event-ID replay history.
Session chat SSE disconnect does not directly interrupt the executor-backed agent.
recommendation: Keep research-only until serialized live acceptance passes, then require an upstream conversation-only sidecar mode with explicit no-tools, SSE replay, and session-stream interruption.
